mapper.select:
select count(*) cnt from review r left outer join users u on r.user_id = u.user_id left outer join lecture l on r.lect_id = l.lect_id
and instr(${fieldStr}, #{keyword}) != 0

select r.review_id, r.score, r.content, r.regdate, r.regip, r.lect_id, r.user_id, u.name as user_name, l.name as lecture_name from review r left outer join users u on r.user_id = u.user_id left outer join lecture l on r.lect_id = l.lect_id where r.review_id = #{reviewId}
